# gamefabric_ping_discovery (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a ping discovery by its unique name.
data "gamefabric_ping_discovery" "this" {
  name = "my-ping-discovery"
}

# Replace "your_provider_your_resource" with your actual provider and resource type.
resource "your_provider_your_resource" "this" {
  ping_discovery_url   = data.gamefabric_ping_discovery.this.url
  ping_discovery_token = data.gamefabric_ping_discovery.this.active_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique ping discovery name.

### Read-Only

- `active_token` (String, Sensitive) The active access token for the ping discovery endpoint.
- `tokens` (List of String, Sensitive) The ordered list of access tokens for the ping discovery endpoint.
- `url` (String) The base URL of the ping discovery endpoint.
